report.executive_summary: Title Commitment 01-26006219-01T is NOT READY FOR CLOSING. Critical defects prevent policy issuance. The recorded deed (01/13/2026) conveys property to Christopher Lane Thornhill and Sara E. Jackson instead of buyer Kyla B. Fortenberry, creating a chain of title break that must be corrected immediately. Additionally, a material discrepancy exists between vested owner (GARNER TREE FARM, LLC) and seller (Terri G. Crawley individually). LLC authorization documentation is required to confirm member consent and authority to convey. Current readiness score: 67/100 with three open flags including one CRITICAL. Closing cannot proceed until: (1) corrected deed from GARNER TREE FARM, LLC to KYLA B. FORTENBERRY is recorded, and (2) complete LLC documentation is submitted and approved.
report.property_info: Property: 675 Bunker Hill Road, Columbia, MS 39429-7832 | Marion County, MS | Parcel: 074-04-000-04-005 | 88.00 acres | Fee Simple Estate | Assessed Value: $9,030 (Land $9,030, Building $0) | Total Property Value: $60,190 (Land $26,180, Improvements $34,010) | Legal Description: Multiple parcels including NE1/4 of SE1/4 and SE1/4 of NE1/4 of Section 4, TSN, R18W, with 13.98 acres in NE1/4 of NE1/4 of Section 4
report.parties: Vested Owner: GARNER TREE FARM, LLC (Mississippi LLC) | Seller: Terri G. Crawley (individual) | Buyer/Proposed Insured (Owner): Kyla B. Fortenberry | Lender/Proposed Insured (Loan): Society Mortgage, Its Successors and/or Its Assigns | Title Underwriter: Old Republic National Title Insurance Company | LLC Members: Ricky Lane McPhail, Terri Garner Crawley, Patsy Garner Brewton, Karen Garner Delancey | Recorded Grantees (INCORRECT): Christopher Lane Thornhill and Sara E. Jackson
report.requirements: REQUIREMENT 1 (OPEN): Vested Owner/Seller Discrepancy - Explain circumstances of GARNER TREE FARM, LLC (vested owner) vs. Terri G. Crawley (seller listed individually). | REQUIREMENT 2 (SATISFIED): No open deed of trust found in Marion County records; verified by escrow inquiry. | REQUIREMENT 3 (SATISFIED): No bankruptcy proceedings found for GARNER TREE FARM, LLC, Terri G. Crawley, or Kyla B. Fortenberry. | REQUIREMENT 4 (CRITICAL - OPEN): Record satisfactory executed Deed from GARNER TREE FARM, LLC to KYLA B. FORTENBERRY. STATUS: FAILED - Recorded deed (Instrument #20260174, 01/13/2026) names Christopher Lane Thornhill and Sara E. Jackson as grantees. CORRECTED DEED MUST BE RECORDED IMMEDIATELY. | REQUIREMENT 5 (OPEN): Record Deed of Trust from Kyla B. Fortenberry (Trustor) to Society Mortgage (Beneficiary) for $80,808.00 principal balance. | REQUIREMENT 6 (OPEN): Submit LLC Documentation: (a) Operating agreement and amendments or certification of none; (b) Good standing certificate; (c) Resolution signed by all four members authorizing transaction; (d) Additional requirements following document review.
report.exceptions: STANDARD EXCEPTIONS: Defects appearing after commitment date (Exception 2), survey exceptions (Exception 3), rights of parties in possession (Exception 4), mechanics' liens (Exception 5), changes in title after commitment (Exception 6), taxes and assessments (Exception 7). | MINERAL INTERESTS (DUPLICATE - HIGH PRIORITY): Exception 1 covers "any prior reservation or conveyance of minerals of every kind and character, including oil, gas, sand and gravel." Exception 8 covers "oil, gas, coal and other mineral interests." Both exceptions address same subject matter; warranty deed confirms minerals are severed from property ("LESS AND EXCEPT all oil, gas, and other minerals"). Recommend consolidation to eliminate ambiguity. | EASEMENTS (STANDARD): VYVX, INC. easement (03/31/1997, recorded 06/09/1997, Book 1224, Page 57) | Bunker Hill Water Association easements (08/19/2009, recorded 07/21/2010, Instrument #201002482, Book 1638, Page 98; and 04/06/2023, recorded 04/10/2023, Instrument #20230965, Book 2023, Page 965). | TAXES: 2025 county taxes for parcel 074-04-000-04-005 - 1st installment $1,132.52 PAID; delinquent amount $0.00.
report.risk_flags: [CRITICAL] Requirement 4 - Wrong Grantee in Recorded Deed: Recorded deed (Instrument #20260174, 01/13/2026) conveys to Christopher Lane Thornhill and Sara E. Jackson instead of Kyla B. Fortenberry. This is a complete chain of title break that prevents issuance of owner's policy. IMMEDIATE ACTION REQUIRED: Obtain corrected deed from GARNER TREE FARM, LLC naming Kyla B. Fortenberry as sole grantee and record in Marion County. | [HIGH] Vested Owner vs. Seller Discrepancy: GARNER TREE FARM, LLC is vested owner; Terri G. Crawley is listed as individual seller. Fundamental title defect requiring resolution. Must clarify whether LLC is conveying through individual member or whether seller designation is incorrect. | [HIGH] Mineral Interests - Duplicate Exceptions: Exceptions 1 and 8 create overlapping coverage of mineral reservations. Warranty deed confirms minerals are severed. Recommend consolidation to eliminate ambiguity and clarify exact mineral rights status. | [MEDIUM] LLC Authorization Documentation: Four-member LLC (Ricky Lane McPhail, Terri Garner Crawley, Patsy Garner Brewton, Karen Garner Delancey) must provide operating agreement, good standing certificate, and member authorization resolution confirming all members consent to sale.
report.readiness: READINESS SCORE: 67/100 - NOT READY FOR CLOSING. Three requirements remain open (Requirements 1, 4, 5, 6). One CRITICAL flag prevents policy issuance. BLOCKING ISSUES: (1) Requirement 4 - Wrong grantee in recorded deed creates title defect; corrected deed must be recorded immediately. (2) Requirement 6 - LLC documentation not yet submitted; operating agreement, good standing certificate, and member authorization resolution required. (3) Requirement 5 - Deed of Trust from buyer to lender not yet recorded. TIMELINE: Closing cannot proceed until corrected deed is recorded and LLC documentation is reviewed and approved. Estimated additional time: 5-7 business days minimum, contingent on prompt submission of corrected deed and LLC documents.
report.recommendations: IMMEDIATE ACTIONS (REQUIRED FOR CLOSING): 1. CORRECTED DEED: Obtain executed deed from GARNER TREE FARM, LLC (all members if required by operating agreement) to KYLA B. FORTENBERRY conveying the subject property. Record in Marion County immediately to satisfy Requirement 4. Provide recorded copy to title company. 2. LLC DOCUMENTATION: Submit to title company: (a) Certified copy of operating agreement and all amendments, or certification that none exist; (b) Certificate of good standing from Mississippi Secretary of State (dated within 30 days); (c) Board/member resolution signed by all four members (Ricky Lane McPhail, Terri Garner Crawley, Patsy Garner Brewton, Karen Garner Delancey) authorizing the sale and conveyance. 3. DEED OF TRUST: Record executed Deed of Trust from Kyla B. Fortenberry (Trustor) to Society Mortgage (Beneficiary) for $80,808.00 principal balance in Marion County. Provide recorded copy to title company. 4. CLARIFY SELLER DESIGNATION: Provide written explanation of relationship between GARNER TREE FARM, LLC (vested owner) and Terri G. Crawley (seller) to satisfy Requirement 1. SECONDARY ACTIONS: 5. MINERAL EXCEPTIONS: Request title company consolidate Exceptions 1 and 8 into single mineral reservation exception to eliminate ambiguity. 6. FINAL REVIEW: Once all requirements are satisfied and documents recorded, request updated commitment and final title review before closing. LENDER CONSIDERATIONS: Loan policy amount ($80,808.00) exceeds owner's policy amount ($80,000.00) by $808.00. Confirm loan amount is accurate and all loan documents are in order. Ensure Society Mortgage is named as sole lender/beneficiary on recorded Deed of Trust.
